**Oxygen frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3.
Geometry: read from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz` (no geometry optimization; single-point at DFT).
SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported.
HOMO = −8.8739616 eV, LUMO = −3.5859031 eV → gap = 5.2880586 eV.

Reproducibility:
• Command:
  `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --charge 0 --mult 3 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpra_qesb_/live.json`
